creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 236494
patch to fix description v2

Hi Daniel,
In the last days there was a bigger change in the ports tree[1]. The WWW entries of pkg-descr where moved into Makefile as a new variable.

The will see it, if you update your ports tree ;)

[1] https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-ports/2022-September/002616.html

I added an updated patch. Please have a look, if it is ok for you.
